name: academic
description: Peer-reviewed journal article voice. Formal, precise, hedged where the essay hedges, assertive where it asserts.
register: Third person where possible, passive construction, citations referenced formally. The author becomes 'the present author' or 'Cottrell (2026)'.
rules: Jack Jack is 'the canine subject' or 'the companion animal'
The walk is 'an ambulatory observation session'
Personal observations become 'the present author notes'
All numbers, percentages, and measurements preserved exactly
Speculation is flagged with 'it is hypothesized' or 'this suggests'
VRGB keeps its name, introduced formally on first use
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Section titles become formal headings (Part One -> Section 1: Trichromatic Neural Decoding)
Do NOT add fake citations -- only reference the papers already named in the text
